channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Martina Navratilova takes shot at Gavin Newsom over California's trans-athlete policy
item.description: Tennis legend Martina Navratilova took a swipe at California Gov. Gavin Newsom over the state's transgender-athlete policy in girls high school sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the combine: Defensive linemen and linebackers
item.description: The NFL Scouting Combine is showcasing top defensive line and linebacker prospects, including James Pearce Jr., Mykel Williams, Mike Green, Shemar Stewart, Jack Sawyer, Donovan Ezeiruaku, Landon Jackson, Princely Umanmielen, Mason Graham, and Kenneth Grant.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Seahawks' Geno Smith seemingly agrees with Republican governor on property tax idea
item.description: Seattle Seahawks quarterback Geno Smith appeared to agree with Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis on the notion of abolishing property taxes. He made a post on X.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NASCAR star William Byron recalls WWE detour after winning Daytona 500
item.description: NASCAR star William Byron recalled attending WWE "Monday Night Raw" the night after winning the Daytona 500 for the second straight time.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ref reports 'Die' chants made at Real Madrid defender Raúl Asencio in Copa semifinal
item.description: MADRID (AP) — Real Sociedad fans chanted “Die” at Real Madrid defender Raúl Asencio during the first leg of the Copa del Rey semifinals on Wednesday, the match referee said in his report.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Japan beats United States 2-1 for SheBelieves Cup women's soccer title
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Toko Koga scored early in the second half and Japan handed the United States its first loss under coach Emma Hayes with a 2-1 victory Wednesday night in the SheBelieves Cup title game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz lose to Kings on Kessler's big night, 118-101
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Despite a season-high 25 points and 14 points from Walker Kessler, the Utah Jazz lost to the Sacramento Kings Wednesday night at the Delta Center, 118-101. Keegan Murray scored a season-high 26 points and Zach Levine added 22 to lift the hot-shooting Kings.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Japan beats United States 2-1 for SheBelieves Cup women's soccer title
item.description: Toko Koga scored early in the second half and Japan held on to beat the United States 2-1 on Wednesday night for the SheBelieves Cup title.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Defensive end Abdul Carter says he's the best player in NFL 2025 draft class
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Former Penn State star Abdul Carter made one thing clear Wednesday: He should be the No. 1 overall pick in this year's NFL draft.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tre Holloman's midcourt buzzer-beater could propel Michigan State to a Big Ten title
item.description: COLLEGE PARK, Md. (AP) — Tre Holloman hadn't even reached the “M” logo at midcourt when he jumped off one foot and let the ball fly. Somehow, it stayed on line before dropping through the hoop with a swish that reverberated across the Big Ten.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Holloman from halfcourt! Buzzer-beater gives No. 8 Michigan State a 58-55 win over No. 16 Maryland
item.description: COLLEGE PARK, Md. (AP) — Tre Holloman made a buzzer-beater from beyond midcourt to give No. 8 Michigan State a 58-55 win over No. 16 Maryland in a sensational finish Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: New Orleans Privateers player suspensions related to possible gambling violations, AP source says
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Four New Orleans players who've been suspended since late January are under investigation for possible NCAA violations related to sports gambling, a person familiar with the situation said.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chiefs' Andy Reid sends Taylor Swift message after music star was booed at Super Bowl
item.description: The three-time Super Bowl-winning coach addressed the treatment of the pop star after she was loudly booed earlier this month at the Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Gary Woodland receives PGA Tour Courage Award as he returns from brain surgery
item.description: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Former U.S. Open champion Gary Woodland was honored Wednesday with the PGA Tour Courage Award as he comes back from brain surgery to remove a lesion that was causing him to have unfounded thoughts that he was dying. Woodland, who won the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lando Norris is fastest and Lewis Hamilton 13th as a power cut disrupts F1 testing
item.description: SAKHIR, Bahrain (AP) — Lando Norris was fastest and seven-time champion Lewis Hamilton 13th as Formula 1 teams had to deal with a power outage that disrupted preseason testing Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wrestling at Frontwave Arena: a preview with Thunder Rosa
item.description: All Elite Wrestling (AEW) is set to bring an action-packed night to Oceanside's Frontwave Arena on Wednesday, with stars like Thunder Rosa, a trailblazer in women's wrestling, ready to take center stage.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Auriemma and Martelli headline Joe Lapchick Character Award recipients
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Geno Auriemma and Phil Martelli headline this year's recipients of the Joe Lapchick Character Award. Joining the two coaches will be longtime men's basketball official Gene Steratore and former Fordham athletic director Frank McLaughlin.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vanderbilt guard Mikayla Blakes eager to grow thanks to attention from her record-setting play
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Vanderbilt freshman Mikayla Blakes knows each time she drops the ball in the basket it will bring more attention. That's what happens when someone scores 53 points, then sets the NCAA freshman single-game scoring record with 55 just 17 days later.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Japanese forward 'King Kazu' turns 58 and prepares for his 40th season in professional soccer
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japanese forward Kazuyoshi Miura turned 58 on Wednesday. Happy Birthday to the player known as “King Kazu.” But there's more to celebrate. He's also set to start his 40th season in professional soccer, the oldest player in the Japanese Football League.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Georgia fans show it's possible to be polite and still celebrate win over No. 3 Florida on the court
item.description: ATHENS, Ga. (AP) — Georgia fans showed it's possible to storm the court for a postgame celebration — and to be polite at the same time. The Stegeman Coliseum public address announcer made repeated requests in the final minute of Georgia's 88-83 upset of No.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Handwritten love letter from Michael Jordan's high school days hits auction
item.description: A series of rare Michael Jordan items, including a holy grail autographed basketball card and a handwritten love letter, are being auctioned at Leland's Auctions in New York.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: University of Utah fires head basketball coach Craig Smith
item.description: The University of Utah has fired the head coach of its men's basketball program, Craig Smith. Assistant coach Josh Eilert will take over for the remainder of the season.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Robertson scores 2 goals in the 2nd period as the Maple Leafs beat the Blackhawks 5-2
item.description: Nicholas Robertson scored twice in the second period as the Toronto Maple Leafs beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-2 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego FC wins inaugural match against LA Galaxy 2-0
item.description: San Diego FC dominated its inaugural match against LA Galaxy 2-0 in the 30th MLS season, scoring its first-ever goal in the 52nd minute.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Luxury portable toilets sought after ahead of NFL draft
item.description: The luxury restroom trailers and containers feature flushing toilets, sinks, air conditioning, and even stereo systems.
item.dc:creator: Timothy Littau, NewsNation

item.title: BYU wins thriller over #19 Arizona, 96-95
item.description: TUCSON, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored a team-high 23 points including two free throws in the final seconds as BYU defeated No. 19 Arizona 96-96 on Saturday evening at a sold out McKale Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hayton records first Utah hat trick in 5-3 loss to Kings
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - Despite Barrett Hayton recording the first hat trick in Utah Hockey Club history, Drew Doughty had a goal and two assists in the Los Angeles Kings’ 5-3 win at Crypto.com Arena on Saturday. “I thought we kind of left it all out there, played with good pace,” Hayton said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lakers snap Nuggets' 9-game winning streak behind Luka Doncic's best game yet for LA
item.description: Luka Doncic scored 32 points in his best game by far with the Lakers, leading Los Angeles to a 123-100 runaway win at Denver on Saturday night that snapped the Nuggets' nine-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kylie Kravig Makes History as CMU’s All-Time Assists Leader
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — When the Colorado Mesa Mavericks need a play, there’s one player they trust to have the ball in her hands—Kylie Kravig. Kravig has been the floor general for the Mavericks all season, averaging six assists per game.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Former NFL player Chris Kluwe arrested while protesting MAGA sign
item.description: Former NFL punter Chris Kluwe, an 8-year NFL veteran who played his entire career with the Minnesota Vikings, took to the podium to voice his opposition to the plaque design.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, NewsNation
